Description: The MCP1825/MCP1825S is a family of 500 mA low-dropout linear regulators designed for applications requiring high current at low output voltages. It features a low quiescent current, stable operation with small ceramic output capacitors, and is available in both fixed-output (MCP1825S: 3-pin; MCP1825: 5-pin) and adjustable-output (MCP1825: 5-pin) versions. Key protections include short-circuit current limiting and overtemperature shutdown. The MCP1825 variant includes a shutdown (SHDN) pin for ultra-low standby current and a power-good (PWRGD) output signal (fixed version) or an adjust (ADJ) pin (adjustable version).

Functions.FunctionDescription: Power supply input pin. Must be bypassed with a capacitor.
Primary ground connection. The package tab is also electrically connected to ground.
Regulated output voltage. Must be bypassed with a capacitor.
Additional ground connection. The package tab is also electrically connected to ground.
